findings.message: Inappropriate import of SessionLocal from database engine module. Routes should not directly access session factory objects; they should only work through repository functions via dependency injection.
findings.suggestion: Remove SessionLocal from imports on line 7. Use the existing create_item function from the repository layer instead.

findings.message: Layering violation: Route handler directly instantiates and manages database session (SessionLocal()) and performs ORM operations inline, bypassing the repository layer. This violates the architectural separation between routes and data access layers.
findings.suggestion: Refactor create_item to follow the same pattern as get_items: inject session via SessionDep dependency, then call repository.create_item(session, payload.name). Move all database logic to the repository layer.
